measured.transcript: Today is Wednesday, May the third, two thousand six. The time is approximately 833 p.m. The location is is twenty eight eleven West Main Street, Casper, Wyoming. My name is Greg Irwin, video specialist of Legal Video of Wyoming. Located at three fifty Katie Lane, Casper, Wyoming. This is case number five nine eight dash six three six nine. Filed in the district court in Toronto County, Wyoming. Eighth Judicial District. Entitled TRZ Corporation versus Max Mutual Insurance Company. The deponent is Paul Frazier. The video deposition is by John Spencer, Attorney for the Defense. The court reporter is Dorothy Bunn of Dor of Bunn and Associates. Counsel and all present will please identify themselves for the record. John Spencer representing the Max Mutual Beverly Wagner representing TRZ Corporation. Witness may be sworn in. Will there be opening remarks before I swear to witness? No. Do you mind if your witness does not stand to be sworn? No, I do not. Sir, do you solemnly swear from the testimony you're about to give today will be the truth, the whole truth, and nothing but the truth under penalty of law? do. Thank you, we're on the records. Mr. Fraser, my name is John Spencer. I represent the Max Mutual Insurance Company. I'll be asking you a series of questions in regard to your knowledge as to the operations of the TRZ plant, which will have a bearing on the outcome of a lawsuit pending between the TRZ corporation and the Max Mutual Insurance Company. I'll ask you to wait to answer until the entire question has been asked, then you must answer verbally, as the court reporter cannot record your nonverbal answers. I will also wait until you have answered the question prior to speaking in response to your answers, as she cannot record two conversations at the same time. Is that understood? Yes, sir. Mr. Fraser, is there any reason that you cannot fulfill your obligations as a witness in this case, such as a medical reason, time restraints, or any other reason? No. Are you taking any medicine that could affect your ability to answer my questions today? No. Thank you. Now let me advise you that you are under oath and you're required to answer every question to the best of your ability and as accurately as possible. If you do not understand the question, please ask me to explain it further, and I'll be happy to do so. If you cannot answer a question accurately, then we are entitled to your best estimate. Is that clear? Yes. Good. Now will you please state your full name and address for the record? Paul Robert Fraser. Forty nine South Third Street, Douglas, Wyoming. And how long have you lived that? About fifteen years. We moved there when I went to work for the TRZ corporation. How old are you, Mr Fraser? Fifty three. Are you married, Mr. Fraser? Yes to the to the same woman for twenty seven years. Do you have any children? Objection, irrelevant. You may answer, Mr. Frazier. yes we have three two boys and a girl but uh they're all married and live elsewhere. Mr. Fraser, what is your educational background?
